name: Rib Eye Express Barbequed Hamburgers
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the hamburger, salt, instant minced onions, and garlic powder in a bowl.
2. Form into patties and place on the grill or smoker.
3. Add desired herb or spice mix to the burger mixture based on preference:
- Savory: (1/4 ts)
- Red Hot: (1 ts crushed hot red pepper)
- Oriental: (1/4 ts ginger, 1 ts lemon zest, 1 ts soy sauce)
- Sesame: (1/4 c toasted sesame seeds)
- Hot-N-Tangy: (1 ts season all or seasoned salt, 1 ts barbecue spice)
- Dill: (1/2 ts crushed dill seed, 1/4 c chopped olives or sweet pickles)
- Herb: (1/4 ts marjoram, 1/8 ts thyme, 1/4 ts celery salt, 1 ts parsley flakes)
- Chili-Cheese: (1 c grated cheese, 1/4 c milk, 1/2 ts chili powder)
- Spice: (1/2 ts dry mustard, 1/4 ts nutmeg, ground)
4. Place the patties in the smoker or cooker with a water pan filled with cold water or ice.
5. Allow the smoker to reach cooking temperature between 180-250 degrees Fahrenheit.
6. Smoke and cook for approximately 1 hour per side (total cooking time is about 2-2.5 hours).
7. Serve with favorite BBQ sauce during the last half hour of cooking.
